title: Cuneiform Tablet #0089: Old Akkadian Divinatory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Divinatory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records divinatory matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
